q: What does Blue Cay Charters offer?
a: We run the Swimming Pigs, Sea Turtles & Snorkel experience out of Rose Island, Nassau. A 3-hour boat tour for all ages.

q: How much does the tour cost?
a: $140 per adult, $100 for kids under 12. Private group charters are also available — message us for pricing.

q: What is included in the price?
a: Snorkeling gear, bottled water, soft drinks, rum punch, snacks, and Rose Island beach admission. All included.

q: What is not included?
a: Lunch and gratuities for the crew. Lunch is available at the beach bar on Rose Island for around $25, or bring your own.

q: How long is the tour?
a: About 3 hours. We make two stops — snorkeling with sea turtles at Green Cay and swimming with the pigs at Rose Island beach.

q: Where do we meet / pickup locations?
a: Two pickup spots: Señor Frog's on Woodes Rogers Walk (best for cruise ship guests) and Margaritaville on Paradise Island (best for Atlantis guests). Select at booking.

q: Is it close to the cruise port?
a: Yes. Señor Frog's pickup is a short walk from the cruise terminal — very convenient for port-day guests.

q: What time do we need to return to the ship?
a: Most guests are back well before 4:30pm. If your ship departs at 5pm or earlier, let us know your sail-away time and we'll book you on the right morning slot.

q: Is snorkel equipment provided?
a: Yes — mask, snorkel, and fins are all included in the price.

q: Is it safe for young children?
a: Ages 0–90 welcome! The pig beach is shallow and great for all ages. The snorkeling area is open water (~8–10 ft deep) so young non-swimmers should stay on the boat.

q: How rough is the boat ride?
a: We ride a fast speedboat so there's some chop on open water. Not recommended for guests with back problems, pregnant travelers, or severe motion sickness.

q: What happens if the weather is bad?
a: Safety first. If we cancel due to poor weather you get a full refund or can reschedule. We'll contact you the night before if conditions change.

q: How many people are on the boat?
a: Maximum 26 guests per trip. We keep it to a comfortable size for a better experience.

q: Can we book a private charter?
a: Yes! Private group charters are available. Message us with your group size and preferred date for a custom quote.

q: How do I confirm my booking?
a: Tell us your date, number of adults and kids, and pickup location. We'll confirm your spot and send payment details. Spots fill up fast — book early!

q: Do you pick up from hotels?
a: Our standard pickup points are Señor Frog's and Margaritaville. If you're staying elsewhere, message us and we'll advise the best option.

q: What is the cancellation policy?
a: Full refund for cancellations made at least 24 hours before your tour start time. Cancellations within 24 hours are non-refundable.

q: What should we bring?
a: Swimwear, sunscreen, a towel, cash for lunch or tips, and a camera! Everything else is provided.

q: Are there alcoholic drinks on board?
a: Yes — rum punch and alcoholic beverages are available on the boat. Soft drinks, juice, and water are also included.

q: Will we definitely see turtles and pigs?
a: We do everything possible to ensure you see both. Turtles are wild so sightings depend on conditions, but our crew knows exactly where to find them.

q: Is there a minimum group size?
a: We require a minimum number of guests per departure. If a trip is cancelled due to low numbers, we'll offer a rebooking or full refund.

q: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
a: Yes, you're welcome to bring your own food and non-alcoholic drinks. Alcoholic beverages from outside are not permitted on the boat.

q: Is there a restroom on the boat?
a: Yes, there is a restroom on board.

q: What activities are available at Rose Island?
a: Swimming with the pigs, beach relaxing, kayaking, paddleboarding, and beach bar lunch. It's a beautiful private island experience.

q: Is the tour wheelchair accessible?
a: Unfortunately our boat tour is not wheelchair accessible due to the nature of boarding and island terrain.

q: Do you operate year round?
a: Yes, we operate year-round weather permitting. Peak season is December through April. Book in advance during busy periods.

q: Can I pay on the day or do I need to pay in advance?
a: A deposit or full payment is required to confirm your booking. We'll send payment details when you confirm your spot.

q: What payment methods do you accept?
a: We accept bank transfer and major payment apps. Details are sent at time of booking confirmation.

q: Are infants allowed on the tour?
a: Yes, infants are welcome. They must sit on a parent's lap during the boat ride. No separate seat required for infants.

q: Do the pigs swim out to the boat?
a: The pigs are on Rose Island beach. You'll go ashore and into the shallow water to interact with and feed them — it's a hands-on experience!

q: Can guests with back problems join?
a: We do not recommend the tour for guests with serious back problems due to the fast speedboat ride over open water.

q: How do I know my booking is confirmed?
a: Once payment is received you'll get a WhatsApp confirmation from us with all your booking details and what to bring.

q: What happens if the cruise line changes itinerary?
a: If your cruise line changes the Nassau port call, we can reschedule your tour or issue a full refund. Just let us know as soon as possible.

q: Is the tour good for non-swimmers?
a: Yes! Non-swimmers can stay on the boat during the snorkel stop and still enjoy the pig beach experience which is in shallow water.

q: Do you have good reviews?
a: We're proud of our customer reviews — guests consistently highlight our crew, the turtle snorkel, and the pig beach as trip highlights. Ask us for a link!

q: What is your WhatsApp number for bookings?
a: You're already on it! Just reply here with your date and group size and we'll get you booked.

q: Do you offer snorkeling without the pig experience?
a: Our standard tour includes both stops. For a custom itinerary message us and we can discuss private charter options.

q: Is parking available at the pickup location?
a: Señor Frog's is walking distance from the cruise port. If driving to Margaritaville, parking is available nearby.

q: How do I get more information?
a: Just message us here on WhatsApp with any questions. We reply fast and love helping guests plan the perfect Nassau experience.

q: What makes Blue Cay Charters special?
a: We're a small local crew that genuinely cares about every guest's experience. We know these waters and we'll do everything to make your Nassau day unforgettable. 🐠
